productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Solid Navy Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Navy blue polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, concealed buttoned chest placket, appliqued and embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Heavy duty masculine elements like aggressive brand detailing on the left chest and solid colours like navy blue lends a rugged edge to this polo neck T-shirt from status quo. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
